description: Onboard live OS telemetry into Splunk (http://localhost:8000, admin/SplunkAdmin1!) by implementing a custom Scripted Input. The telemetry must consist of real system metrics (e.g., from /proc, df, or free) formatted as single-line key-value pairs containing the identifier 'event_type=live_os_telemetry'. The script must be located at /opt/splunk/etc/apps/search/bin/ with executable permissions. Configure the Scripted Input to run every 60 seconds, assigning the Source Type 'os_telemetry' and the Index 'system_logs'. Create a saved search (Report) named 'Live_Telemetry_Monitor' that performs statistical aggregation on these metrics within the 'system_logs' index.
